steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase solitary artist describes the understanding that the discovery of Vermeer's students would directly contradict.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Negating means to contradict or deny—precisely what this discovery does to the solitary-artist understanding.

The other choices either strengthen that view (entrenching, substantiating) or describe something unrelated (prefiguring).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
